_comment_health: rc24+ replaced /status with /actuator/health/readiness (per dvarahq/dvara#665). The anonymous probe needs no Bearer.
_comment_secrets: Set GATEWAY_LICENSE_KEY, GATEWAY_ENCRYPTION_MASTER_PASSWORD, GATEWAY_SERVER_API_KEY, GATEWAY_METRICS_API_KEY in the Railway service Variables tab. Railway doesn't have a SECRET type in railway.json — all four must be set out-of-band before first deploy or the gateway refuses startup.
